offer: For construction accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes budget overruns. We simplify the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor invoices with project budgets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction accountants
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to construction accountants with a demo video
Community forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and budget tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
